CustomField.formula: CASE( Gerencia__c, "Estructura", "N000", "Comercial", "N001", "Nateevo - Consulting", "N002", "Nateevo - Experience", "N003", "Nateevo - Smartech", "N004", "Nateevo - Development", "N005", "Nateevo - Brand Services", "N006", "Nateevo-Business Value", "N007", "Operaciones", "N008", "Customer Centric", "V017", "Digital Experience", "V002", "Tailor-Made Solutions", "V003", "Regulatory & Data", "V004", "Governance & Infrastructure", "V005", "No utilizar (Consultoría)", "V006", "Talent Solutions", "V007", "Operaciones", "V009", "Innovación (BV)", "V010", "Proyectos Internos", "V011", "Comercial", "V012", "Hybris", "V013", "Integration & Processes", "V014", "Delivery Cross", "V016", "Customer Centric", "V017", "Business Consulting", "V018", "Datamorphosys", "V019", "Staffing (MX)", "MX20", "Servicios Diversos (Serb)", "S020", "Customer Experience", "T002", "Intelligent Technology", "T005", "S/4", "T004", "Comunytek", "V021", "Intelligent Enterprise", "T001", "Cloud Nine", "V022", "Nateevo - Delivery Success", "N011", "Nateevo - Data & Analytics", "N009", "Nateevo - Media", "N010", "SAP CX", "V023", "Nateevo Inside VASS","V024", "T4S Inside VASS","V025", "Sin Asignar", "V000", /* valor adicional si hay duplicados */ "No definido" )
CustomField.label: GerenciaCode
